findings.message: Lifecycle script executes shell commands via curl piped to bash. This runs automatically on npm install.
Imports child_process module, enabling arbitrary command execution on the host system.
Reads sensitive environment variable GITHUB_TOKEN. Combined with network access, this enables credential theft.

entries.name: exa-mcp-server
entries.description: A Model Context Protocol server with Exa for web search and web crawling. Provides real-time web searches with configurable tool selection, allowing users to enable or disable specific search capabilities. Supports customizable result counts, live crawling options, and returns content from the most relevant websites.
